pg20-p1-s2:
Our very lives, as ex-problem drinkers, depend upon our constant thought of others and how we may
help meet their needs.
pg20-p1:
more useful to others. Our very lives, as ex-problem drinkers, depend upon our constant thought of others and how we may
help meet their needs.
pg20-p2-s1: You may already have asked yourself why it is that all of us became so very ill from drinking.
pg20-p2-s2:
Doubtless you are curious
to discover how and why, in the face of expert opinion to the contrary, we have recovered from a hopeless condition of
mind and body.
pg20-p2-s3: If you are an alcoholic who wants to get over it, you may already be asking -"What do I have to do?"
pg20-p2:
You may already have asked yourself why it is that all of us became so very ill from drinking. Doubtless you are curious
to discover how and why, in the face of expert opinion to the contrary, we have recovered from a hopeless condition of
mind and body. If you are an alcoholic who wants to get over it, you may already be asking -"What do I have to do?"
pg20-p3-s1: It is the purpose of this book to answer such questions specifically.
pg20-p3-s2: We shall tell you what we have done.
pg20-p3-s3:
Before going
into a detailed discussion, it may be well to summarize some points as we see them.
pg20-p3:
It is the purpose of this book to answer such questions specifically. We shall tell you what we have done. Before going
into a detailed discussion, it may be well to summarize some points as we see them.
pg20-p4-s1: How many times people have said to us: "I can take it or leave it alone.
pg20-p4-s2:
Why can't he?" "Why don't you drink like a
gentleman or quit?" "That fellow can't handle his liquor." "Why don't you try beer and wine?" "Lay off the hard
stuff." "His will power must be weak." "He could stop if he wanted to." "She's such a sweet girl, I should think he'd
stop for her sake." "The doctor told him that if he ever drank again it would kill him, but there he is all lit up
again."
pg20-p4:
How many times people have said to us: "I can take it or leave it alone. Why can't he?" "Why don't you drink like a
gentleman or quit?" "That fellow can't handle his liquor." "Why don't you try beer and wine?" "Lay off the hard
stuff." "His will power must be weak." "He could stop if he wanted to." "She's such a sweet girl, I should think he'd
stop for her sake." "The doctor told him that if he ever drank again it would kill him, but there he is all lit up
again."
pg20-p5-s1: Now these are commonplace observations on drinkers which we hear all the time.
pg20-p5-s2:
Back of them is a world of ignorance and
misunderstanding.
pg20-p5-s3: We see that these expressions refer to people whose reactions are very different from ours.
pg20-p5:
Now these are commonplace observations on drinkers which we hear all the time. Back of them is a world of ignorance and
misunderstanding. We see that these expressions refer to people whose reactions are very different from ours.
pg20-p6-s1: Moderate drinkers have little trouble in giving up liquor entirely if they have good reason for it.
pg20-p6-s2:
They can take it or
leave it alone.
pg20-p6:
Moderate drinkers have little trouble in giving up liquor entirely if they have good reason for it. They can take it or
leave it alone.
pg20-p7-s1: Then we have a certain type of hard drinker.
pg20-p7-s2: He may have the habit badly enough to gradually impair
